refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability to inputs, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance metrics
selected_dp.selected_dp: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance metrics; Structured performance requirements database schema; Version-controlled requirements management system

potential_sources: Data flow between derivation engine and database schema
coupling_check.notes: The DPs are logically coupled but modular; clear interfaces separate derivation, storage, and management functions minimizing tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if version control is not tightly integrated
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface definitions and data consistency protocols between derivation engine, database, and version control.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized system-level module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends updated performance requirements to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication for updates and synchronization with other modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this module centralizes performance requirement functions; low diffusion risk.
Limited containment; risk of diffusion if performance logic is duplicated here.
Minimal containment; high diffusion risk if performance management is spread here.
Not relevant for performance requirement derivation; high diffusion risk if included.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the performance requirement derivation, recording, and management in the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and history maintenance.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Dependency on reliable telemetry and network link interfaces
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution; ensure robust interface contracts and fallback mechanisms for telemetry and network link.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well decomposed and mapped to logically distinct DPs with clear functional boundaries.

diffusion_risks: Avoid duplication of performance logic in Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the single ownership module, reducing diffusion risk.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of all sub-FRs to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define detailed interface contracts for Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link
Establish monitoring for complexity and diffusion risk in NGHE Solution

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and mapping to DP and IM is complete, consistent, and meets the acceptance criteria with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level or implementation detail.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
Telemetry and network interfaces are reliable
open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
Potential data inconsistency without strict version control integration
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability from inputs to performance targets
History maintenance of baselines and calibration updates
